capabilities_used.evidence: 核心表达长期是顺着强上升趋势做多。例：2024-12-19 “BITCOIN BELOW $100,000 IS TOO CHEAP”; 2025-03-31 “BITCOIN WILL GO TO $150,000 VERY SOON!!!! AND THEN 200k”。图3也明显用台阶式更高高点/更高低点来推演继续上行。
他多次把加密方向直接锚定美股风险偏好。2025-06-29 明说：“look at the stock market It’s so insanely bullish We are in pump season and crypto follows stonks”。图6也是股票指数大涨截图，作为加密看多证据。
他频繁把 Fed 降息/流动性改善作为主驱动。2025-06-27：“FED WILL CUT RATES IN JULY!!!!!”; 2025-06-28：“Bitcoin dominance will start dropping once FED starts easing They will cut rates in July”。这是典型“宽松=风险资产牛市”框架。
他大量使用牛市年度/阶段性叙事而非短线信号。2024-12-31：“2025 is gonna be the biggest year for crypto”; 2025-09-27：“OCTOBER IS THE BEST MONTH FOR BITCOIN WE CALL IT PUMPTOBER”。属于减半后牛市阶段推演。
他常用“这一轮/这个季度/这赛季”的大周期模板来预测顶部和轮动。2025-11-26：“2014 - MtGox 2018 - Bitconneeeeect 2022 - FTX, Celsius 2026 - ???????” 体现明显的四年周期思维与周期顶/熊市记忆。

对山寨季的判断几乎都基于 BTC.D 下降。2024-10-31：“gaming will come back big time as bitcoin dominance drops”; 2025-06-28：“Bitcoin dominance will start dropping...”; 2025-06-30：“The grand rotation will take place later this year”。
他会用前关键位翻转为阻力/支撑的思路。2025-04-23：“PLS is using the previous ATL (ALL TIME LOW) as RESISTANCE!!!!!!!!!!”。这本质就是前结构位失守后变成阻力的 breaker / S-R flip 框架。
图8出现明显长下影刺破后迅速收回，典型扫流动性后反弹的观察角度。Ivan 的图表偏爱这种‘先吓人洗掉再拉回’的解读，符合 sweep / stop-hunt 框架。
图8不仅像 liquidity sweep，也是一根关键位长针拒绝。其图表表达不是复杂指标，而是用极端 wick 来证明下方买盘吸收。
他并不倾向把回调当趋势反转，更多是‘bull trend中的可买回踩’。2024-12-19 与 2024-12-20 连续喊 “BUY THE F***ING DIP!!!!! / BUYBUYBUY...”; 2025-07-31：“BITCOIN DIP IS VERY NICE BUY IT NOW BEFORE ITS TOO LATE!!!!”。
虽然公开样本里均线细节不多，但他有明确机械均线锚点。2026-01-30：“I WILL BUY BITCOIN AT 200W MA AT $60,000!!!!!! ... i will follow the mechanical rules and the plan we have set out”。说明他把关键长周期均线当制度化买点。
他常把机构买盘/大资金参与当上涨背书。2025-05-21 至 2025-05-28 多次引用 Saylor、BlackRock、Coinbase 资产负债表买币叙事，虽然不是严格 ETF 流量表，但属于“机构资金支撑 BTC”的事件反应框架。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: CME Gap Fill Magnet
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use CME Bitcoin futures gaps as unfinished business. Gap fills are treated as key milestones; once filled, trader expects continuation or a fresh directional expansion.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把 BTC CME 期货缺口视为未完成目标位。价格回补缺口后，认为市场‘清障完成’，随后应启动新的趋势推进。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-10-29：“BITCOIN CME GAP FILLED!!!!!!!! NO EXCUSE FOR THE BULLS TO NOT GO TO ATH RIGHT NOW AND START THE Q4 RALLY!!!!!”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Crypto Calendar Seasonality
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trade around repeated month-based seasonal narratives such as Uptober, Q4 rally, and New Year momentum, using calendar effects as a conviction amplifier.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 围绕 Uptober、Q4 rally、新年行情等高频月份叙事建立方向偏见，把日历季节性当作加仓和提高信念的放大器。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-10-29：“UPTOBER HAS DELIVERED LIKE HEELLL”; 2025-09-27：“OCTOBER IS THE BEST MONTH FOR BITCOIN WE CALL IT ‘PUMPTOBER’”; 2024-12-31：“2025 is gonna be the biggest year for crypto”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: 200W MA Mechanical Bid
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Set predefined bids around the 200-week moving average as a non-discretionary long-term accumulation rule.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把 200 周均线当作预先设定的机械化接多区域，不依赖主观盘中判断，属于周期级别的规则化吸筹。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-01-30：“I WILL BUY BITCOIN AT 200W MA AT $60,000!!!!!! ... i will follow the mechanical rules and the plan we have set out”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Stair-Step Resistance Ladder
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Map bull markets as a sequence of flat resistance shelves broken one after another, projecting continuation to the next ladder rung.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把牛市理解为一层层水平阻力被依次突破的阶梯结构，每突破一层，就朝下一层目标推进。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图3中连续用粉色水平线标出多个平台阻力，价格逐级突破后直接箭头指向更高目标位，是他非常典型的视觉表达。

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 大级别牛市中不把高价当贵，而是把回调视为仍然低估。
默认策略是在牛市回撤中加仓，而不是等待完美抄底确认。

personal_quirks.quote: look at the stock market It’s so insanely bullish We are in pump season and crypto follows stonks
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先看美股风险偏好，再判断加密的方向与节奏。

personal_quirks.quote: BITCOIN CME GAP FILLED!!!!!!!! NO EXCUSE FOR THE BULLS TO NOT GO TO ATH RIGHT NOW
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 关键技术障碍完成后，立即上调趋势延续概率，不接受中性解释。

personal_quirks.quote: I WILL BUY BITCOIN AT 200W MA AT $60,000!!!!!! ... i will follow the mechanical rules and the plan we have set out
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在高波动资产上用少数机械化规则固定长期买点，避免情绪化。

unique_traits: 他和典型严谨 TA 交易员不同，核心不是指标细算，而是把宏观流动性、牛熊周期、社群情绪和超简化结构图叠加成高亮信念叙事。图表上偏爱最容易传播的水平位、台阶突破、长针洗盘，而不是复杂指标体系。实操风格极端偏多、重 BTC 主线，再用 BTC.D 和 Fed/美股框架去外推 ETH、SOL 与山寨季。

high_conviction_phrases: BITCOIN WILL GO TO $150,000 VERY SOON
WE WILL GO HIGH VERY HIGH
low_conviction_phrases: either poop the bed OR ROCKET BOOST TO THE UPSIDE NOW
